about_item: AIRLINE APPROVED EXPANDABLE PET CARRIER - 18" inches Length x 10.4" inches Width x 11" inches Height, Fits Pets up to 17" in length X 10" in height and up to 15lbs. Airline capable carriers are designed for pets lying down, so your pet may not be able to stand. Designed with a Ventilated Roof and meets all airline regulations of under forward seat compatibility including Delta, Southwest, United, American, Virgin and others

AIRLINE REQUIREMENTS - I work with representatives of various airlines in the design of all of my airline capable totes. Always keep in mind each airline sets their own specific regulations, and they can even vary from their domestic, international and shuttle routes so it is always advised to check with your airline of choice. All will require your pet to be comfortable in the carrier, and to remain under the seat in front of you. All prefer a soft sided carrier for its pliability.

SNOWFLAKE 2 TONE FABRIC - Easily cleaned with a wipe down, waterproof, and it comes with a plush interior fleece padding which is both comfortable and easy to clean (recommend hand wash or dry clean) Tote folds to less than 3" when not in use

STURDY AND LIGHTWEIGHT - Designed with Breathable Resin Mesh for Proper Ventilation * Removable Plush Faux Fleece Bedding with Plywood Base Insert for Stability & Strength * Padded Shoulder Strap * Storage Compartment for Treats, Phones or Medications. The design of the shoulder strap is engineered and tested to 40lbs of swing stress so this model is best for pets under 15lbs. ﻿The snowflake nylon material is so durable and strong it is also used in the construction of military grade parachutes.

PAY A SHELTER PET FORWARD - We donate a percentage of gross profits to animal welfare organizations, animal shelters and rescues of all types. SATISFACTION GUARANTEE & TWO YEAR WARRANTY AGAINST DEFECTS - Simply return the product for a no questions asked refund if not satisfied. QUALITY AND TESTING - We use our products with our own pets, and we test and improve our products constantly to provide you the absolute best quality at the most excellent every day price possible

summary.text: Customers find this pet carrier to be of great quality, sturdy, and perfect for air travel, with a cute design. They appreciate its comfort, with one customer noting it provides enough space for their pet to sleep, and like its storage features, with one mentioning a compartment that allows the pet to walk around. The carrier's dimensions receive mixed feedback - while some say it fits even under a Southwest seat, others find it too big for airline travel. Durability opinions are also mixed, with some finding it very durable while others report issues.

authors_reviews.title: Even fits Southwest!
authors_reviews.text: This bag is great! I bought this right after I adopted my pup and started using it as a car carrier when he was only 3 months old. I live in a city and its not safe for him to be moving around the car while I drive. He doesn't seem to mind being in the carrier at all (although he does get car sick on long drives, but I don't think that is the fault of the particular carrier). It has openings on both ends and on the top, so there are lots of options for how to get him into the bag. There's also a way to loop the seatbelt through it to make it more secure. I don't know if that would really protect in an accident, but it's better than nothing.I recently flew with my pup on Southwest Airlines and I was very nervous that this bag wouldn't fit under the seat. It is about 11" tall and has a fairly sturdy frame (this is nice because it doesn't collapse down on the dog). Southwest claims that their underseat areas are only 8" high! I took a chance because I wanted my pup to fly in something that he was already comfortable with. As it turns out, it fit almost PERFECTLY. I even realized after takeoff that I could push the bag further into the underseat area and expand the mesh side!I should say that when I got home, I realized that the frame on one side did get bent from squishing it down a bit. However, this didn't affect my pet's experience and I was able to mostly bend it back with my hands. Also, it only has one small mesh pocket, so I would plan on having another "personal item" carry on to hold the basics that you need for the airport.All in all, I think it's much cuter than other travel bags at this price point, my dog likes it, the "balcony" is nice for some added room, and it fit even under a Southwest seat. I would buy it again.
authors_reviews.author: Ashley Wegner

authors_reviews.title: The best dog carrier and airline approval
authors_reviews.text: I bought this dog carrier for my 15 lb bishop to travel in AA and I can tell you it was the best buy and find. Is little high in cost but worth every penny. No problems with the airline, TSA, a ND my dog was super comfortable for the 3 hour flight. I totally recommend the carrier!
authors_reviews.author: OG

authors_reviews.title: Solid, multi-functional carrier
authors_reviews.text: This really is a great product and I’m so happy I found it. My dog will only be about 15lbs max once she’s fully grown and under normal circumstances (i.e., in a world when COVID was not a concern), my family and I traveled a decent amount. Assuming we can travel again one day, I really need a carrier that I can fit under the seat when on the plane. This bag will serve that purpose. And in the meantime, I still do drive around town and bring the pup with me. I appreciate that this bag has safety restraints to pull the seat belt through and really secure the carrier inside the car. It’s a well made bag that seems to have very sturdy materials, and the additional bonus is that it has one side that expands (I thought about getting the double expanding bag but decided against it since the dog is small and not likely to stay in there for extended periods of time). Highly recommend this carrier if you’re out and about a lot but don’t want something that takes up a lot of space while not in use (folds down), and don’t want to get a bunch of other gear like a car booster, crate, etc. Of course, this really only makes sense if your dog is very small; I’ve seen a number of people complain that it’s too small but then say their dog is 20-25lbs. I think ~15lbs is really going to be about the heaviest/biggest a dog should be to stay in this carrier comfortably.
authors_reviews.author: JaninaD

authors_reviews.title: Sturdy enough for a German Shepherd pup!
authors_reviews.text: I was nervous finding an acceptable carrier for bringing my German Shepherd puppy on the plane but this met my standards. She was 10 weeks old, 25lbs. It was tight but we let her poke her head out the top and clasped her in the inside clasp so she’d stay put. She had enough space to comfortable sleep like that. The pocket on the side is handy, I fit a portable water/food dish in it and some doggie food. I also was able to store doggie bags in the pocket on the front. Great quality! Stood up to her anxiousness and was a comfortable carry. Cute design, would recommend to a friend.
authors_reviews.author: Lacey

authors_reviews.title: It's a great carrier and I love the features
authors_reviews.text: It's a great carrier and I love the features; well designed. My 5.5 lb maltipoo puppy fit well and seemed comfortable on the flights. The downside is that Teddy chewed the velcro that holds the support dowels in and one came out of its pocket and through the mesh. Not a crisis, but definitely not ideal. I'm sure the dowels are removeable for laundering, but now even with the velcro closed the dowels don't stay in.I also wish the side pockets were a bit bigger, especially for flights. There's not a ton of space for food, treats, accessories for the puppy... let alone for the human companion, especially if I were travelling with a rollerboard.The carrier doesn't fit under AA seats very well. This wasn't an issue for me as I'm short but I could see someone over 5'3" not having any leg room... or possibly being hassled by a flight attendant.
authors_reviews.author: LJ

authors_reviews.title: Secure, comfortable, and airline compliant !!
authors_reviews.text: This is the best cat carrier for travel! I was moving two cats (bought 2 carriers) to Europe and needed to find airline compliant, comfortable, and secure carriers. Mr Peanut’s carriers were the best decision! My cats scratched at the carriers profusely and they never escaped after 18 hours of travel. The carriers are extremely light weight and comfortable to carry using the shoulder strap, hand held strap, and the suitcase handle slip was so helpful for the train portion of our long journey. If your cat is fairly anxious, I highly recommend the carrier that had the extra privacy coverage screen because it was used almost the entire time for one of mine. I also recommend bringing a small blanket that the cat likes for comfort, more privacy, and a familiar scent to help calm them down during times of extra stress. But the best part of this carrier was that there was room for a small blanket, small pouch of food / treats, and we even clipped on the Mr. Peanut travel bowl! My larger cat that wasn’t as nervous absolutely loved the expandable carrier and was able to sprawl out during the flight.This company and product is absolutely the best! 5 stars!
authors_reviews.author: MM

other_countries_reviews.title: Awesome quality
other_countries_reviews.text: I haven't used this for travel with my cat yet, but I already have it open in the living room so my cat can get used to it before we travel. I have a fairly large cat and he has enough room in the bag even without the side open. I was worried that he wouldn't have room, but due to airline regulations I need a bag exactly with the measurements they set out so he is allowed in the cabin with me. But testing it out I am relieved to see that he fits comfortably. The quality of the bag is amazing and there's lots of pockets for my cat's travel documents.
other_countries_reviews.author: Stanley Shane Walter

other_countries_reviews.title: Great buy.
other_countries_reviews.text: Great carrier. I haven’t used it on a plane yet but I use it for my car travels. The carrier can be seat belted in, and my pup travels comfortably and safely in my truck. Lots of room. Well made, and classy looking
other_countries_reviews.author: S. Donovan

other_countries_reviews.title: Perfect for the plane
